channel.title: python on I'm Mauricio Alpuin
channel.description: Recent content in python on I'm Mauricio Alpuin

item.title: Journey from your laptop to a CI/CD to Kubernetes - Part 2
Speech to Text - Transcribe your WhatsApp audios
item.description: The other day I was playing with the openai library that transcribes and translates audios, this library is call whisper and there is a package for python. But I really wanted to use it for something else. Almost every day, I receive Whatsapp audios when I am in the middle of a meeting. So I decided to write some code to integrate the transcriber library into the Whatsapp API. And this is the Speech to Text Bot.

item.title: Journey from your laptop to a CI/CD to Kubernetes
item.description: In today’s post I want to write something that came to my mind when I was trying to write code. In particular I was trying to remember how to write code again, so I started to write some kind of API with Flask. Many people love Flask for its simplicity and I wanted to give it a try to see how easy it was to create a functional API from scratch.
